title: Commission seeks feedback on new EU Aviation and Aeronautics Strategy
content: The Commission has launched preparations for an EU Aviation and Aeronautics Strategy and is inviting stakeholders to share their feedback through a call for evidence.
snippet: The Commission has launched preparations for an EU Aviation and Aeronautics Strategy and is inviting stakeholders to share their feedback through a call for evidence.

title: Making skills count: How PES are applying skills-based approaches
content: A new Thematic Paper has been published by the European Network of Public Employment Services (PES Network) examining how PES across Europe are adopting skills-based approaches to improve job profiling, job matching, job vacancy description, reskilling and upskilling.
snippet: A new Thematic Paper has been published by the European Network of Public Employment Services (PES Network) examining how PES across Europe are adopting skills-based approaches to improve job profilin

title: Joint press release: EU and partners sign the Global Green Bond Initiative Fund to mobilise up to €20 billion in investments for sustainable infrastructure
content: The European Union and partner development finance institutions have signed the Global Green Bond Initiative (GGBI) Fund, a new public-private investment tool to mobilise up to €20 billion of private capital for sustainable infrastructure projects in low and middle-income countries.
snippet: The European Union and partner development finance institutions have signed the Global Green Bond Initiative (GGBI) Fund, a new public-private investment tool to mobilise up to €20 billion of private

title: Solidarity and fairness in focus at European Youth Week
content: European Youth Week 2026 takes place from 24 April to 1 May 2026. This year’s edition is dedicated to solidarity and fairness as we celebrate 30 years of volunteering in Europe.
snippet: European Youth Week 2026 takes place from 24 April to 1 May 2026. This year’s edition is dedicated to solidarity and fairness as we celebrate 30 years of volunteering in Europe.

title: Europe's new platform to help unlock funding for a bio-based future
content: The Bioeconomy Investment Deployment Group (BIDG) will help Europe’s bioeconomy access the funding it needs to grow.
snippet: The Bioeconomy Investment Deployment Group (BIDG) will help Europe’s bioeconomy access the funding it needs to grow.

title: Global Gateway: Commissioner Síkela announces new investments on his mission to Addis Ababa
content: During his two-day mission to Addis Ababa, Commissioner Jozef Síkela opened the EU-Ethiopia Business Forum and announced a new major investments package. This will strengthen the partnership between the European Union and Ethiopia and advance the European Global Gateway investments strategy.

title: Chernobyl 40 years later: Learning from the past
content: How we manage nuclear safety and prepare for the future, must be guided by the lessons we learn from the past. 40 years since the Chernobyl disaster, take a look at what the EU is doing to promote nuclear safety around the world and how it has helped to protect Chernobyl from further leakage.

title: Assessing climate change risks along Spain’s coast
content: A new project aims to assess the risks that climate change pose to the development of marine aquaculture along the entire Spanish coastline.
snippet: A new project aims to assess the risks that climate change pose to the development of marine aquaculture along the entire Spanish coastline.

title: Conference addresses discoverability of European cultural content online
content: A conference held on 20 April brought together policymakers, cultural and creative sectors, platforms and researchers, to discuss how to improve the discoverability of European cultural content in the digital environment.
snippet: A conference held on 20 April brought together policymakers, cultural and creative sectors, platforms and researchers, to discuss how to improve the discoverability of European cultural content in the

title: EU customs education partners meet in Tallinn to strengthen training collaboration
content: On 25–26 March 2026, representatives from European universities, customs administrations, and the European Commission gathered in Tallinn, Estonia, to discuss the future of customs education under the EU Recognition of Customs Academic Programmes initiative.
snippet: On 25–26 March 2026, representatives from European universities, customs administrations, and the European Commission gathered in Tallinn, Estonia, to discuss the future of customs education under the

title: EU and EIB to boost businesses in partner countries through €1.3 billion financing
content: As a result of a new agreement between the European Commission and EIB Global, private project partners, small and medium-sized enterprises (SMEs) and financial institutions in EU’s partner countries will have access to €1.3 billion in funding to support infrastructure projects in clean energy...
snippet: As a result of a new agreement between the European Commission and EIB Global, private project partners, small and medium-sized enterprises (SMEs) and financial institutions in EU’s partner countries

title: Provisional Application of the EU-Mercosur Interim Trade Agreement Begins 1 May 2026
content: On 1 May 2026, the EU-Mercosur Interim Trade Agreement (ITA) will enter into provisional application.
snippet: On 1 May 2026, the EU-Mercosur Interim Trade Agreement (ITA) will enter into provisional application.

title: Safeguarding Chornobyl: strengthening protection and resilience in Ukraine
content: Nearly four decades after the disaster, the site is once again at the centre of concern amid ongoing instability in Ukraine due to the on-going armed conflict.
snippet: Nearly four decades after the disaster, the site is once again at the centre of concern amid ongoing instability in Ukraine due to the on-going armed conflict.

title: Institution Building Days 2026: Strengthening Institutions and Improving Lives
content: On 22 and 23 April 2026, the European Commission held its annual Institution Building Days in Brussels, marking the 30th anniversary of the Technical Assistance and Information Exchange Instrument (TAIEX).
snippet: On 22 and 23 April 2026, the European Commission held its annual Institution Building Days in Brussels, marking the 30th anniversary of the Technical Assistance and Information Exchange Instrument (TA

title: CBAM: How to make decarbonisation efforts pay off
content: Join us on 7 May for a webinar designed to help exporters in a third-country master the CBAM methodology and turn compliance into a strategic advantage.
snippet: Join us on 7 May for a webinar designed to help exporters in a third-country master the CBAM methodology and turn compliance into a strategic advantage.

title: Commission launches public consultation on the European Ocean Act
content: Today, the Commission launched a public consultation to help shape the European Ocean Act, a key legislative proposal under the European Ocean Pact, set for adoption in 2026.
snippet: Today, the Commission launched a public consultation to help shape the European Ocean Act, a key legislative proposal under the European Ocean Pact, set for adoption in 2026.

title: New episode – DGT podcast: Languages and Technology
content: Discover how Dutch teacher Monsieur Nash makes language learning fun. Episode 8 of the DGT Podcast: Languages & Technology on multilingualism, motivation & innovative teaching.
snippet: Discover how Dutch teacher Monsieur Nash makes language learning fun. Episode 8 of the DGT Podcast: Languages & Technology on multilingualism, motivation & innovative teaching.

title: New Candidate EOSC Nodes strengthen the EOSC Federation and support the European Research Area
content: Fourteen new candidate nodes join the EOSC Federation, expanding its thematic and geographic coverage.
snippet: Fourteen new candidate nodes join the EOSC Federation, expanding its thematic and geographic coverage.

title: 2028 European Green Capital and Green Leaf Awards: Meet the applicants
content: The finalists for the Green Capital and Green Leaf Awards will be announced in early July.
snippet: The finalists for the Green Capital and Green Leaf Awards will be announced in early July.

title: EU adopts 20th package of sanctions against Russia
content: The Commission welcomes the Council's adoption of the 20th Russia sanctions package, that puts further pressure on Russia to engage in negotiations and do so on terms acceptable for Ukraine.
snippet: The Commission welcomes the Council's adoption of the 20th Russia sanctions package, that puts further pressure on Russia to engage in negotiations and do so on terms acceptable for Ukraine.

title: EU adopts 20th package of sanctions against Russia
content: The Commission welcomes the adoption by EU Member States of the 20th package of sanctions against Russia.
snippet: The Commission welcomes the adoption by EU Member States of the 20th package of sanctions against Russia.

title: Youth voices help shape Europe’s circular future at annual conference
content: The 2026 European Circular Economy Stakeholder Platform (ECESP) gathering focused on the upcoming Circular Economy Act (CEA).
snippet: The 2026 European Circular Economy Stakeholder Platform (ECESP) gathering focused on the upcoming Circular Economy Act (CEA).

title: Statement by President von der Leyen with President Costa and President Zelenskyy
content: Today is a good day – for Ukraine and for Europe. You might recall, Volodymyr, that when I visited Kyiv in February this year, I said we will deliver on the EUR 90 billion loan one way or the other. Today, we deliver on this promise.

title: Boosting Ukraine’s energy, small businesses and strategic industries: EU–Ukraine Business Summit unveils new investment package
content: On 22-23 April 2026, Brussels hosted the EU-Ukraine Business Summit. The event was co-organised by the European Commission, Ukraine’s Government, and Poland as host of the 2026 Ukraine Recovery Conference, bringing together over 1,000 business leaders, policymakers, and investors.
snippet: On 22-23 April 2026, Brussels hosted the EU-Ukraine Business Summit. The event was co-organised by the European Commission, Ukraine’s Government, and Poland as host of the 2026 Ukraine Recovery Confer

title: EU approves €90 billion loan for Ukraine and further sanctions against Russia
content: In a joint statement, Presidents von der Leyen, Costa and Zelenskyy welcomed the adoption of the Ukraine support loan of €90 billion for 2026 and 2027 and of the 20th sanctions package against Russia.
snippet: In a joint statement, Presidents von der Leyen, Costa and Zelenskyy welcomed the adoption of the Ukraine support loan of €90 billion for 2026 and 2027 and of the 20th sanctions package against Russia.

title: Commission recommendation to facilitate Power Purchase Agreement take-up
content: The Commission has today published a Recommendation on removing barriers to the development of power purchase agreements (PPAs) and other energy purchase agreements. PPAs comprise long-term bilateral contracts typically concluded between generators and corporate consumers.
snippet: The Commission has today published a Recommendation on removing barriers to the development of power purchase agreements (PPAs) and other energy purchase agreements. PPAs comprise long-term bilateral

title: Commissioner Kos hosts third EU-Ukraine Business Summit
content: Today, Commissioner for Enlargement Marta Kos and Ukraine's Deputy Prime Minister for European and Euro-Atlantic Integration Taras Kachka will open the third EU-Ukraine Business Summit in Brussels.
snippet: Today, Commissioner for Enlargement Marta Kos and Ukraine's Deputy Prime Minister for European and Euro-Atlantic Integration Taras Kachka will open the third EU-Ukraine Business Summit in Brussels.

title: Networking, telecom and videoconferencing equipment market consultation – Natacha V
content: Directorate-General for Digital Services of the European Commission has launched an open market consultation to gather feedback from economic operators interested in participating in a future public procurement procedure for the provision of networking, telecom and videoconferencing equipment.
